response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq involves full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Prior roles at Optilyz (TypeScript, AWS, React, MongoDB) and RIDE Capital (Node, TypeScript, GraphQL, TDD) align with the primary stack. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C/C++, PHP, Swift) covers the multiple-language requirement, though Kotlin and Python are not explicitly mentioned. Solid testing/TDD culture evident (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, TDD at RIDE). Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, MySQL, Git all present. Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly named, but Node.js/TypeScript depth makes adoption trivial. React experience confirmed at Optilyz. BSc in CS satisfies the degree requirement. Concerns: no explicit Nest.js/Vitest/Python/Kotlin mention; cloud experience limited to AWS (no GCP/Azure shown); located in Lagos which may raise timezone questions for a Berlin-centric stack history.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role — directly matches a required skill
Strong TDD/testing craftsmanship, including authored test frameworks and taught courses
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Python in the stack
Cloud exposure appears AWS-only; no GCP/Azure evidence
Heavy DLang specialization may not transfer; secondary languages on JD (Kotlin/Java) only lightly covered
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer whose recent work hits the two highest-signal requirements: production TypeScript/Node/React delivery and hands-on AI-agent/MCP tooling. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python are minor given his polyglot track record and TDD discipline, and are easily closed on the job. A strong interview candidate.
